final.clue: This one-sentence response best explains how a student should connect Question and Explore to evidence in AP Seminar.

final.explanation: Final Jeopardy checks whether students can move beyond recall. A strong response names the relevant Question and Explore idea, uses evidence from the prompt or source, and explains the connection in context. That is the common scoring habit across NYS standards-aligned tasks and AP CED-style review.

That is the common scoring habit across NYS standards-aligned tasks and AP CED-style review.
